decisions.briefing: Markets were quiet today — S&P 500 flat, NASDAQ down just 0.4%. Cash sits at $477, which is just below the $500 threshold that triggers new position-opening, so no buys today. Existing 6 positions remain held; semiconductor leaders like KLAC, TER, and QCOM continue showing clean momentum setups and are top candidates when cash is replenished via a sale or profit-taking.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities were mixed on June 25, with the S&P 500 holding flat while the NASDAQ pulled back 0.4%, driven by softness in large-cap technology names. Mega-cap stocks like NVDA, AAPL, MSFT, and PLTR are all trading below their 20-day moving averages with bearish MACD signals, indicating continued distribution. Meanwhile, mid-cap semiconductors (KLAC, TER, QCOM, MXL) are holding bullish momentum structures, pointing to quiet sector rotation under the surface.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市於6月25日表現分化，標普500基本收平，納斯達克則因大型科技股走弱而小幅回落0.4%。英偉達、蘋果、微軟、Palantir等大型科技股均跌破20日均線，MACD亦呈現看跌訊號，顯示機構持續減持。與此同時，中型半導體股如KLA、Teradyne、高通、MXL等仍維持強勁動能格局，顯示市場正悄然發生板塊輪動，資金由大型成長股流向半導體等估值更具吸引力的子板塊。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors move money out of one area of the market and into another, often because valuations, growth expectations, or macro conditions shift. Today's setup illustrates this clearly: mega-cap tech (NVDA, AAPL, MSFT) is weakening and trading below key moving averages, while mid-cap semiconductors (KLAC, TER, QCOM) are building bullish momentum structures. Spotting rotation early — before the crowd piles in — is one of the key edges in active portfolio management.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從市場某一板塊撤出，轉投另一板塊，通常因估值差異、增長預期轉變或總體經濟條件改變而觸發。今日市場格局清晰呈現這一現象：大型科技股（英偉達、蘋果、微軟）持續走弱，跌破關鍵均線；而中型半導體股（KLA、Teradyne、高通）則正在構築看漲動能結構。能在主流資金大規模湧入前識別板塊輪動，是主動投資組合管理的核心優勢之一。
